A Map with additional utility methods.

```ts
class Collection<Key, Value> extends Map<Key, Value>
```

<a id="method-at"></a>

### `at()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L178" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:178" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Identical to Array.at().
Returns the item at a given index, allowing for positive and negative integers.
Negative integers count back from the last item in the collection.

```ts
at(index: number): Value | undefined
```

<a id="method-equals"></a>

### `equals()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L981" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:981" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Checks if this collection shares identical items with another.
This is different to checking for equality using equal-signs, because
the collections may be different objects, but contain the same data.

```ts
equals(collection: ReadonlyCollection<Key, Value>): boolean
```

Maps each item into a Collection, then joins the results into a single Collection. Identical in behavior to
Array.flatMap().

```ts
flatMap<NewValue>(fn: (value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => Collection<Key, NewValue>): Collection<Key, NewValue>
```

<a id="method-flatmap"></a>

### `flatMap()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L605" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:605" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Maps each item into a Collection, then joins the results into a single Collection. Identical in behavior to
Array.flatMap().

```ts
flatMap<NewValue, This>(fn: (this: This, value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => Collection<Key, NewValue>, thisArg: This): Collection<Key, NewValue>
```

<a id="method-foreach"></a>

### `forEach()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/node_modules/.pnpm/typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/typescript/lib/lib.es2015.collection.d.ts#L28" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: node_modules/.pnpm/typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/typescript/lib/lib.es2015.collection.d.ts:28" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Executes a provided function once per each key/value pair in the Map, in insertion order.

```ts
forEach(callbackfn: (value: Value, key: Key, map: Map<Key, Value>) => void, thisArg?: any): void
```

<a id="method-get"></a>

### `get()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/node_modules/.pnpm/typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/typescript/lib/lib.es2015.collection.d.ts#L33" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: node_modules/.pnpm/typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/typescript/lib/lib.es2015.collection.d.ts:33" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Returns a specified element from the Map object. If the value that is associated to the provided key is an object, then you will get a reference to that object and any change made to that object will effectively modify it inside the Map.

```ts
get(key: Key): Value | undefined
```

<a id="method-has"></a>

### `has()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/node_modules/.pnpm/typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/typescript/lib/lib.es2015.collection.d.ts#L37" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: node_modules/.pnpm/typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/typescript/lib/lib.es2015.collection.d.ts:37" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

```ts
hasAll(...keys: Key[]): boolean
```

```ts
hasAny(...keys: Key[]): boolean
```

<a id="method-intersection"></a>

### `intersection()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L1036" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:1036" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

```ts
intersection(other: ReadonlyCollection<Key, any>): Collection<Key, Value>
```

<a id="method-keyat"></a>

### `keyAt()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L202" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:202" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Identical to Array.at().
Returns the key at a given index, allowing for positive and negative integers.
Negative integers count back from the last item in the collection.

```ts
keyAt(index: number): Key | undefined
```

<a id="method-keys"></a>

### `keys()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/node_modules/.pnpm/typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/typescript/lib/lib.es2015.iterable.d.ts#L153" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: node_modules/.pnpm/typescript@5.9.3/node_modules/typescript/lib/lib.es2015.iterable.d.ts:153" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

<a id="method-map"></a>

### `map()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L636" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:636" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Maps each item to another value into an array. Identical in behavior to
Array.map().

```ts
map<NewValue>(fn: (value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => NewValue): NewValue[]
```

<a id="method-map"></a>

### `map()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L639" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:639" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Maps each item to another value into an array. Identical in behavior to
Array.map().

```ts
map<This, NewValue>(fn: (this: This, value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => NewValue, thisArg: This): NewValue[]
```

<a id="method-mapvalues"></a>

### `mapValues()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L672" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:672" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Array.map().

```ts
mapValues<NewValue>(fn: (value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => NewValue): Collection<Key, NewValue>
```

<a id="method-mapvalues"></a>

### `mapValues()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L675" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:675" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Array.map().

```ts
mapValues<This, NewValue>(fn: (this: This, value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => NewValue, thisArg: This): Collection<Key, NewValue>
```

<a id="method-merge"></a>

### `merge()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L1164" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:1164" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Merges two Collections together into a new Collection.

```ts
merge<OtherValue, ResultValue>(other: ReadonlyCollection<Key, OtherValue>, whenInSelf: (value: Value, key: Key) => Keep<ResultValue>, whenInOther: (valueOther: OtherValue, key: Key) => Keep<ResultValue>, whenInBoth: (value: Value, valueOther: OtherValue, key: Key) => Keep<ResultValue>): Collection<Key, ResultValue>
```

<a id="method-partition"></a>

### `partition()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L543" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:543" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Partitions the collection into two collections where the first collection
contains the items that passed and the second contains the items that failed.

```ts
partition<NewKey>(fn: (value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => key is NewKey): [Collection<NewKey, Value>, Collection<Exclude<Key, NewKey>, Value>]
```

<a id="method-partition"></a>

### `partition()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L546" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:546" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Partitions the collection into two collections where the first collection
contains the items that passed and the second contains the items that failed.

```ts
partition<NewValue>(fn: (value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => value is NewValue): [Collection<Key, NewValue>, Collection<Key, Exclude<Value, NewValue>>]
```

<a id="method-partition"></a>

Partitions the collection into two collections where the first collection
contains the items that passed and the second contains the items that failed.

```ts
partition(fn: (value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => unknown): [Collection<Key, Value>, Collection<Key, Value>]
```

<a id="method-partition"></a>

```ts
partition<This, NewKey>(fn: (this: This, value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => key is NewKey, thisArg: This): [Collection<NewKey, Value>, Collection<Exclude<Key, NewKey>, Value>]
```

<a id="method-partition"></a>

Partitions the collection into two collections where the first collection
contains the items that passed and the second contains the items that failed.

```ts
partition<This, NewValue>(fn: (this: This, value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => value is NewValue, thisArg: This): [Collection<Key, NewValue>, Collection<Key, Exclude<Value, NewValue>>]
```

<a id="method-partition"></a>

### `partition()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L565" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:565" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

Partitions the collection into two collections where the first collection
contains the items that passed and the second contains the items that failed.

```ts
partition<This>(fn: (this: This, value: Value, key: Key, collection: this) => unknown, thisArg: This): [Collection<Key, Value>, Collection<Key, Value>]
```

```ts
random(): Value | undefined

```


<a id="method-sort"></a>

### `sort()` <a class="source-reference__heading-link" style="float: right; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-block: -0.125rem; margin-inline-start: 0.5rem; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); text-decoration: none;" href="https://github.com/toommyliu/lucent/blob/dev/packages/collection/src/index.ts#L1006" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true" title="Open source: packages/collection/src/index.ts:1006" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><svg class="source-reference__icon" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m18 16 4-4-4-4"></path><path d="m6 8-4 4 4 4"></path><path d="m14.5 4-5 16"></path></svg></a>

If a comparison function is not provided, the function sorts by element values, using the same stringwise comparison algorithm as
Array.sort().

```ts

```
